meaning: 扎加齐格[埃及东北部城市]
examples: His symptoms began on 10 May 2009 and he was admitted to Zagazig Fever Hospital on 11 May.
Both cases were admitted to Zagazig Fever Hospital where they received oseltamivir and are in a stable condition.
He led the Brotherhood's parliamentary bloc from 2000 to 2005 in addition to serving as president of the Department of Materials Science, Faculty of Engineering at Zagazig University.
